_comment: Copy this file to retailer_sync_config.json and fill in your values.
_comment_server_mode: LOCAL = same LAN as wholesaler. CLOUD = internet HTTPS server.
_comment_server_url: Base URL of the wholesaler ERP. No trailing slash. LOCAL example: http://192.168.1.100:8000  CLOUD example: https://erp.company.com
_comment_api_key: The API key shown on wholesaler Admin > RetailerMaster for THIS retailer.
_comment_retailer_id: Numeric retailer_id from wholesaler Admin > RetailerMaster.
_comment_retailer_code: Human-readable code, e.g. R1, R2, R3, R4.
_comment_sync_interval_seconds: How often to poll wholesaler for new requests (10 recommended).
_comment_max_retry_attempts: How many times to retry a failed status push before queuing it.
_comment_log_file: Path to the log file. Use relative path or absolute path.
_comment_cache_db_file: SQLite file used for local request cache and pending update queue.
